title: Special Programs: Compensatory Services and Intensive Programs
description: Conroe ISD provides additional academic support and intensive programs for students who are struggling or at risk of falling behind in school. The district outlines how it identifies these students and what kinds of extra help—such as tutoring, small group instruction, or specialized programs—are available to them. Parents and community members can use this policy to understand how the district works to help every student meet grade-level expectations.
